title: Dropdown menu view and arrangement
excerpt: I would love to see or have the ability to make this drop down box longer so that I don’t have to scroll to see more than 4 workspaces at a time.  It would also be great if we could rearrange the order that they are l…

posts.author: Trisha (Trisha Emery)
posts.cookedHtml:
image484×832 63.6 KB

I would love to see or have the ability to make this drop down box longer so that I don’t have to scroll to see more than 4 workspaces at a time. It would also be great if we could rearrange the order that they are listed.
